reasoning: The control SC-12(5) focuses on cryptographic key establishment and management, specifically involving PKI certificates and hardware tokens. In Kubernetes, this maps to ensuring that TLS certificates used for securing communications (e.g., API server, etcd, ingress) are properly managed and rotated. While Kubernetes does not directly manage hardware tokens, it can enforce TLS configurations and certificate management practices.
title: Cryptographic Key Establishment And Management - Cryptographic key establishment and management | pki certificates / hardware tok
